caseName: Plunkett v. U.S. Bank National Association

recap_documents.description: ORDER: As explained in the attached Memorandum and Order, Defendants U.S. Bank National Association, Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., and Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s motions to dismiss  29   30   49  are granted. The Clerk of Court is directed to remove Defendants U.S. Bank National Association, Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., and Wells Fargo Bank N.A. from the docket.  So Ordered by Judge Sanket J. Bulsara on 5/23/2025.  (YEP)
recap_documents.short_description: Order on Motion to Dismiss AND Order on Motion to Dismiss
